text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Gracing the end of year with one final show, it's
the Arima Kinen! All the fan favorites are here!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Including two sisters that I'm sure each and every
fan has been waiting to see race! That's right,
both Biwa Hayahide and Narita Brian are here
today!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: What do you think strength is, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Is it being able to compete against anyone? Is it
possessing an unwavering heart?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I think it's being able to stand up on your own.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Even if you have no power, or if your spirit is
broken...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
It's about not accepting the comfort of lying
down—whether or not you have the will to try and
stand.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I want to stand on my own two feet, like everyone
who's come before, and carry onward as far as I
can.
choice_data_list: I'll be cheering you on all the way.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. But not from the back or the front—I want
you watching from by my side.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: So let's walk the same road together.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
That's right. I'm expecting a lot from you today,
Sis.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Haaa! My heart is pounding a little!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I hope I can be as cool as those two! They shine
bright like stars!
